description: Create the full backend directory structure, configuration, and core utilities (excel_parser, text_processing, embeddings, RAG ingest/retriever, prompts, services, API routes, schemas). This is the complete backend implementation as a single coherent unit.
steps: Create backend/ directory structure: app/, app/api/, app/api/routes/, app/models/, app/services/, app/rag/, app/utils/, data/templates/, data/chroma_db/, scripts/, tests/
Copy the Excel file from repo root to backend/data/templates/: cp 'CLMS Pemetaan Kontrak.xlsx' backend/data/templates/
Create backend/requirements.txt with: fastapi, uvicorn, openpyxl, chromadb, langchain, langchain-community, python-dotenv, pydantic, pydantic-settings, httpx, python-docx, jinja2, regex
Create backend/.env.example with LLM_BASE_URL=http://localhost:1234/v1, CHROMA_DB_PATH, TEMPLATES_DIR, etc.
Create backend/app/__init__.py (empty)

Create backend/app/config.py using pydantic-settings BaseSettings to load .env with fields: LLM_BASE_URL, LLM_MODEL_NAME, CHROMA_DB_PATH (default data/chroma_db), TEMPLATES_DIR (default data/templates), EMBEDDING_MODEL (default nomic-embed-text-v1.5)

Create backend/app/utils/__init__.py and backend/app/utils/excel_parser.py - Parse the KHS Material sheet: extract clause objects with fields (pasal_number, section_name, clause_text, variables list, is_mandatory). Parse 'Pemetaan Kontrak ' sheet for status mapping. Handle multi-row clauses where Pasal is in col A, section in col B, text in col C, variables in col D across multiple rows.

Create backend/app/utils/text_processing.py - Functions: extract_placeholders(text) using regex to find [PLACEHOLDER] patterns, replace_placeholders(text, mapping), format_clause_for_embedding(clause), clean_legal_text(text)

Create backend/app/rag/__init__.py and backend/app/rag/embeddings.py - Wrapper around chromadb's built-in embedding or a Nomic embedding function. Use chromadb's default embedding function or implement a simple SentenceTransformer-based one compatible with Nomic.

Create backend/app/rag/ingest.py - IngestService class: takes parsed clauses from excel_parser, chunks them appropriately (by clause/pasal), creates metadata (pasal_number, section_name, template_name, variables, mandatory_status), stores in ChromaDB collection.
Create backend/app/rag/retriever.py - RetrieverService class: query ChromaDB by template name, by clause topic, get all clauses for a template in order, get mandatory clauses only.

Create backend/app/rag/prompts.py - System prompts for Llama-3: LEGAL_DRAFTING_SYSTEM_PROMPT (instruct model to produce formal Indonesian legal language, no hallucination, stick to template), CLAUSE_ASSEMBLY_PROMPT, VARIABLE_FILLING_PROMPT. Include few-shot examples.

Create backend/app/models/__init__.py and backend/app/models/schemas.py - Pydantic models: DraftRequest (template_name, variables dict, include_optional bool), DraftResponse (html_content, metadata), TemplateInfo (name, description, clauses count, variables list), ExportRequest (html_content, format), ClauseSchema, VariableSchema.
Create backend/app/models/database.py - placeholder for future PostgreSQL/Prisma integration.

Create backend/app/services/__init__.py and backend/app/services/llm_service.py - LLMService class: async calls to LMStudio endpoint (OpenAI-compatible), generate_draft(), fill_variables(), with retry logic and streaming support.
Create backend/app/services/drafting_service.py - DraftingService class: orchestrates RAG retrieval, constructs prompt with retrieved clauses + user variables, calls LLM, formats output as HTML.
Create backend/app/services/export_service.py - ExportService class: convert HTML to .docx using python-docx, preserve formatting (headings, paragraphs, numbered lists).
Create backend/app/api/__init__.py, backend/app/api/dependencies.py - Shared dependency injection for services.
Create backend/app/api/routes/__init__.py, drafting.py (POST /api/draft), templates.py (GET /api/templates, GET /api/templates/{name}), export.py (POST /api/export/docx).
Create backend/app/main.py - FastAPI app with CORS middleware, lifespan for ChromaDB init, include all routers.
Create backend/scripts/ingest_templates.py - CLI script that loads Excel, parses with excel_parser, ingests into ChromaDB using IngestService. Print progress and summary.

Create backend/tests/__init__.py, test_excel_parser.py (test parsing KHS sheet), test_rag_pipeline.py (test ingest and retrieval with temp ChromaDB), test_drafting.py (test schema validation, prompt construction).
Create backend/README.md with setup instructions, architecture overview, and usage guide.
acceptance_criteria: All files in the specified directory structure exist with proper Python code
Running 'pip install -r backend/requirements.txt' succeeds without errors
backend/app/utils/excel_parser.py can parse the KHS Material Ketenagalistrikan sheet and extract all 45 clauses with their variables
backend/scripts/ingest_templates.py runs successfully and populates ChromaDB
Running 'python -m pytest tests/ -v' from backend/ passes all tests
All modules have proper type hints and docstrings
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/PengembanganAI-CLMS/backend && python -c 'from app.main import app; print(app.title)'
Run: cd /projects/sandbox/PengembanganAI-CLMS/backend && python -c 'from app.utils.excel_parser import ExcelParser; p = ExcelParser(); print(p)'
findings: All 38 tests pass. Excel parser correctly extracts 45 clauses with 56 variables from KHS Material Ketenagalistrikan sheet. ChromaDB ingest and retrieval work correctly. Use python3 (not python) as pyenv doesn't have a global python alias set. ChromaDB telemetry warning about posthog capture() is benign and does not affect functionality. Pydantic deprecation warning about class-based config is cosmetic only.
